examples: They wind up with the same self-styled grandiosity; they've just found a more interesting way to get to the same point.
And to what adolescent striving to define an identity do inflated self-esteem and grandiosity not appear attractive?
Their jokes, while juvenile, were innocuous, whereas Richards displayed a self-importance verging on grandiosity.
Lastly come classic instances of rotten character, a sickening virus of entitlement and careless grandiosity.
The coming months will expose the grandiosity of his vision for this commission.
